option.value:
# MongoDB Configuration spring.data.mongodb.uri=mongodb://localhost:27017/digital_ecosystem
# Server Configuration server.port=8080
# JWT Configuration manus.app.jwtSecret=ManusDigitalEcosystemSecretKeyForJWTAuthentication1234567890 manus.app.jwtExpirationMs=86400000
# Swagger UI Configuration springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs
# i18n spring.messages.basename=messages spring.messages.encoding=UTF-8 spring.messages.fallback-to-system-locale=false
# Logging logging.level.com.manus.digitalecosystem=DEBUG

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# MongoDB Configuration spring.data.mongodb.uri=mongodb://localhost:27017/digital_ecosystem
# Server Configuration server.port=8080
# JWT Configuration manus.app.jwtSecret=ManusDigitalEcosystemSecretKeyForJWTAuthentication1234567890 manus.app.jwtExpirationMs=3600000 manus.app.jwtRefreshExpirationMs=2592000000
# Swagger UI Configuration springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs
# i18n spring.messages.basename=messages spring.messages.encoding=UTF-8 spring.messages.fallback-to-system-locale=false
# Logging logging.level.com.manus.digitalecosystem=DEBUG

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Validation validation.email.required=Email is required validation.email.invalid=Invalid email format validation.password.required=Password is required validation.password.size=Password must be at least {min} characters validation.role.required=Role is required validation.university.name.required=University name is required validation.company.name.required=Company name is required validation.verification_status.required=Verification status is required validation.department.name.required=Department name is required validation.department.university_id.required=University id is required validation.student.full_name.required=Full name is required validation.student.university_id.required=University id is required validation.student.department_id.required=Department id is required validation.job.title.required=Job title is required validation.internship.title.required=Internship title is required validation.application.opportunity_type.required=Opportunity type is required validation.application.opportunity_id.required=Opportunity id is required validation.application.status.required=Application status is required validation.announcement.category.required=Announcement category is required validation.announcement.title.required=Title is required validation.announcement.content.required=Content is required validation.task.title.required=Task title is required validation.task.completed.required=Completion status is required validation.achievement.student_id.required=Student id is required validation.achievement.title.required=Achievement title is required validation.user.status.required=User status is required validation.user.full_name.required=Full name translations are required validation.reset.token.required=Reset token is required
# Errors error.validation.failed=Validation failed error.unexpected=An unexpected error occurred error.auth.bad_credentials=Invalid email or password error.auth.unauthorized=Unauthorized error.auth.forbidden=You don't have permission to perform this action error.auth.user_disabled=Your account is disabled error.user.not_found=User not found with id: {0} error.user.email.exists=Email already exists: {0} error.user.email.not_found=No account exists with this email: {0} error.user.inactive=Your account is not active. Please contact support. error.user.translation.required=Provide full name in en, fa, and ps. error.university.profile.exists=University profile already exists for this account error.university.profile.not_found=University profile not found for this account error.university.not_found=University not found with id: {0} error.company.profile.exists=Company profile already exists for this account error.company.profile.not_found=Company profile not found for this account error.company.not_found=Company not found with id: {0} error.file.empty=File is required error.file.upload_failed=Failed to upload file error.file.id.invalid=Invalid file id: {0} error.file.not_found=File not found: {0} error.department.not_found=Department not found with id: {0} error.department.profile.not_found=Department not found for this account error.department.admin.exists=Department admin is already assigned for this department error.department.university_mismatch=Department does not belong to the selected university error.student.profile.exists=Student profile already exists for this account error.student.profile.not_found=Student profile not found for this account error.student.not_found=Student not found with id: {0} error.student.not_verified=Student is not verified yet error.student.university.required=University id is required error.job.not_found=Job not found with id: {0} error.internship.not_found=Internship not found with id: {0} error.application.not_found=Application not found with id: {0} error.application.duplicate=You have already applied for this opportunity error.application.opportunity_type.invalid=Invalid opportunity type error.announcement.not_found=Announcement not found with id: {0} error.announcement.university.required=University id is required for this action error.notification.not_found=Notification not found with id: {0} error.task.not_found=Task not found with id: {0} error.task.assignees.required=At least one assignee is required when assignedToAll is false error.achievement.not_found=Achievement not found with id: {0} error.reset.token.invalid=Invalid reset token error.reset.token.expired=Reset token has expired error.reset.token.used=Reset token has already been used
# Success success.auth.login=Login successful success.auth.logout=Logout successful success.auth.forgot_password=Password reset token generated successfully success.auth.reset_password=Password was reset successfully success.user.created=User created successfully success.user.list=Users fetched successfully success.user.me=Current user fetched successfully success.user.fetched=User fetched successfully success.user.status_updated=User status updated successfully
# Notifications notification.student.verification.title=Student verification updated notification.student.verification.body=Your verification status is now: {0} notification.task.assigned.title=New task assigned notification.task.assigned.body=Task: {0} notification.opportunity.new.title=New opportunity posted notification.opportunity.new.body={0} notification.announcement.new.title=New announcement notification.announcement.new.body={0}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Validation validation.email.required=Email is required validation.email.invalid=Invalid email format validation.password.required=Password is required validation.password.size=Password must be at least {min} characters validation.role.required=Role is required validation.university.name.required=University name is required validation.company.name.required=Company name is required validation.verification_status.required=Verification status is required validation.department.name.required=Department name is required validation.department.university_id.required=University id is required validation.student.full_name.required=Full name is required validation.student.university_id.required=University id is required validation.student.department_id.required=Department id is required validation.job.title.required=Job title is required validation.internship.title.required=Internship title is required validation.application.opportunity_type.required=Opportunity type is required validation.application.opportunity_id.required=Opportunity id is required validation.application.status.required=Application status is required validation.announcement.category.required=Announcement category is required validation.announcement.title.required=Title is required validation.announcement.content.required=Content is required validation.task.title.required=Task title is required validation.task.completed.required=Completion status is required validation.achievement.student_id.required=Student id is required validation.achievement.title.required=Achievement title is required validation.user.status.required=User status is required validation.user.full_name.required=Full name translations are required validation.reset.token.required=Reset token is required validation.refresh.token.required=Refresh token is required
# Errors error.validation.failed=Validation failed error.unexpected=An unexpected error occurred error.auth.bad_credentials=Invalid email or password error.auth.unauthorized=Unauthorized error.auth.forbidden=You don't have permission to perform this action error.auth.user_disabled=Your account is disabled error.auth.refresh.invalid=Your session has expired or is invalid. Please log in again. error.user.not_found=User not found with id: {0} error.user.email.exists=Email already exists: {0} error.user.email.not_found=No account exists with this email: {0} error.user.inactive=Your account is not active. Please contact support. error.user.translation.required=Provide full name in en, fa, and ps. error.university.profile.exists=University profile already exists for this account error.university.profile.not_found=University profile not found for this account error.university.not_found=University not found with id: {0} error.company.profile.exists=Company profile already exists for this account error.company.profile.not_found=Company profile not found for this account error.company.not_found=Company not found with id: {0} error.file.empty=File is required error.file.upload_failed=Failed to upload file error.file.id.invalid=Invalid file id: {0} error.file.not_found=File not found: {0} error.department.not_found=Department not found with id: {0} error.department.profile.not_found=Department not found for this account error.department.admin.exists=Department admin is already assigned for this department error.department.university_mismatch=Department does not belong to the selected university error.student.profile.exists=Student profile already exists for this account error.student.profile.not_found=Student profile not found for this account error.student.not_found=Student not found with id: {0} error.student.not_verified=Student is not verified yet error.student.university.required=University id is required error.job.not_found=Job not found with id: {0} error.internship.not_found=Internship not found with id: {0} error.application.not_found=Application not found with id: {0} error.application.duplicate=You have already applied for this opportunity error.application.opportunity_type.invalid=Invalid opportunity type error.announcement.not_found=Announcement not found with id: {0} error.announcement.university.required=University id is required for this action error.notification.not_found=Notification not found with id: {0} error.task.not_found=Task not found with id: {0} error.task.assignees.required=At least one assignee is required when assignedToAll is false error.achievement.not_found=Achievement not found with id: {0} error.reset.token.invalid=Invalid reset token error.reset.token.expired=Reset token has expired error.reset.token.used=Reset token has already been used
# Success success.auth.login=Login successful success.auth.logout=Logout successful success.auth.forgot_password=Password reset token generated successfully success.auth.reset_password=Password was reset successfully success.auth.refresh=Token refreshed successfully success.user.created=User created successfully success.user.list=Users fetched successfully success.user.me=Current user fetched successfully success.user.fetched=User fetched successfully success.user.status_updated=User status updated successfully
# Notifications notification.student.verification.title=Student verification updated notification.student.verification.body=Your verification status is now: {0} notification.task.assigned.title=New task assigned notification.task.assigned.body=Task: {0} notification.opportunity.new.title=New opportunity posted notification.opportunity.new.body={0} notification.announcement.new.title=New announcement notification.announcement.new.body={0}
